text: Scalping at the achievable per-pair edge is locked-positive but cash-negative: canary v2 ep0 locked +£16.4 yet day_pnl −£236.
Break-even arithmetic (T=0.30 rollout): locked +£0.88/matured vs −£1.25 toll/non-matured, so break-even needs ~59% maturation vs ~13–38% achievable.

locator.quote: a STRUCTURAL constraint, not a tuning/reward/PPO one

text: Structural root: Betfair's 5% commission forces the passive far enough out that fill rate stays ≤38%, below the >50% scalping break-even — a structural constraint, not a tuning/reward/PPO one.
